subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-21
subcodes.first_line: Thank the Lord that you have attained His eternal favors and have been blessed with seeing eyes. All are blind but you are endowed with sight.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکر کنید خدا را بالطاف باقیه فائز شدید و دیدهٴ بینا یافتید همه کورند و شما بینا جمیع زمینی هستند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
